content.en:
After Ye Tian bid for the next place, he did not continue to bid.

And at this time, the Golden Glass Great Ancestor and some other Great Ancestors came to him.

"Xuanming Great Ancestor, do you have any extra foreign silver sand, can you trade it to me!"

In the face of the requests of the Great Ancestors, Ye Tian almost ignored them.

Because these Great Ancestors can't give anything good at all, if it's an ordinary resource, even if there are more, they can't attract him.

However, the Golden Glass Great Ancestor's request for a trade attracted him.

"Xuanming Great Ancestor, how about I want to use a piece of knowledge to trade your Heterosilver Sand? This knowledge is a blocked knowledge in the entire Xuanqi Zero Realm, and even if you leave the Hopeless Land, it will be difficult to obtain this knowledge. This knowledge is how to impact high-level immeasurable lifeforms!"

The words of the Golden Glass Ancestor made Ye Tian a little moved.

The Alien Silver Sand was not lacking at all for him now, but the knowledge of impacting high-level immeasurable lifeforms was precious.

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Subsequently, they discussed it and finally decided to exchange 500,000 different silver sand for this piece of knowledge.

With 500,000 different silver sands, the Golden Glass Ancestor was sure enough to win a place.

Soon, Ye Tian completed the deal with the Golden Glass Great Ancestor.

......

I saw Ye Tian holding an inheritance ball to absorb the knowledge inside, and after a while, he knew how to impact the high-level immeasurable lifeform.

"I didn't expect the impact of high-level immeasurable lifeforms to be like this!"

Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

Through this inheritance knowledge, it is known that even if a middle-level immeasurable lifeform has cultivated to the limit, it is impossible to succeed if he can indiscriminately attack the realm of high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

First of all, a mid-level immeasurable lifeform must undergo nine reforges at the life level, so that it can support the power of impacting the high-level immeasurable lifeform, otherwise the forcible impact will definitely die, and it cannot exist.

In addition, there is also a requirement for immeasurable will, that is, a minimum of 500 scales.

Of course, the Immeasurable Path must also reach the extreme realm, which is also the minimum requirement, and if you comprehend the Immeasurable Extreme Path in advance, it is naturally the best.

"This is too demanding, the immeasurable will reaches 500, how is this possible, I used so many gray crystals in the immeasurable sea of suffering to refine the immeasurable will, and only then did I raise the immeasurable will to 350 scale!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In his opinion, even if he had more gray crystals, it was unlikely that he would be able to raise the immeasurable will to 500 scales, and there must be some way, but he didn't know very well at the moment.

However, the most important thing is life reforge, if you can't reforge the life level, you can't break through it no matter what.

And this knowledge is also a detailed explanation of life reforge, which is also the knowledge that has been blocked.

Life reforge requires the use of some materials to form a recipe, and then the body is reforged, so that the life level can complete the metamorphosis again and again.

The increase in strength of each transformation is not large, but after nine reforges, the transformation of strength is still extremely huge, and the passage to high-level immeasurable lifeforms has been opened.

"The major forces in the Xuanqi Realm have the formula for reforging, and they don't announce it, because they are afraid that those middle-level immeasurable lifeforms will break through to high-level immeasurable lifeforms and threaten their rule!"

Ye Tian guessed.

And the inheritance knowledge of the Golden Glass Ancestor does not contain any formula, maybe the Golden Glass Ancestor has a formula, but it is impossible to exchange this bit of different silver sand for a formula.

A recipe has the potential to create a powerful force, and its value is almost priceless!

Of course.

It is very likely that the Golden Glass Great Ancestor does not have a formula, because many high-level immeasurable lifeforms do not have formulas, and the major forces will strictly protect the formula, and will only give the internal members the finished resource materials, and it is difficult to deduce the formula from the resource materials.

If the recipe was so easy to deduce, it would have been a secret for a long time.

"When we get out of the hopeless land, we have to find a way to get a recipe!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But the formula is definitely not so easy to get, and even if you join a top power, you can't get the formula easily, unless you become the top few powerhouses of that force, you can hope to get the formula.

Time passed slowly, and after a while, all forty places were finally auctioned out.

"Okay, all forty places have been auctioned, and there is still no Great Ancestor willing to sell the Alien Silver Sand to us. If it is not sold this time, it will be impossible to say when you will come here next time, and you may even never come!" Xuanwu Dazu said.

"What, is it possible that it will never come?"

Some of the mid-level immeasurable lifeforms whose promotion time was not long changed their faces.

However, the other middle-level immeasurable lifeforms were very indifferent, so the Great Ancestor of Xuanqi Pavilion also said the same thing last time, this was just to fool these Great Ancestors into trading the Alien Silver Sand to them.

It's just a routine!

Sure enough, there were mid-level immeasurable lifeforms that couldn't help it, and traded all the few foreign silver sands in their hands in exchange for some resources.

After no Great Ancestor was willing to trade, the Great Ancestors of Xuanqi Pavilion beckoned the forty Great Ancestors who had won the bid to come over, and then flew to Yinlin Kun.

In an instant, a cyan shield appeared on Yinlin Kun's body, covering many Great Ancestors.

Airplanes!!!!

Yinlin Kun escaped into the Voidless Galaxy, and wandered in the Voidless Galaxy, and ordinary creatures did not dare to approach.

Little by little, time passed.

Abrupt.

The faces of those two high-level immeasurable lifeforms were solemn, which made many Great Ancestors nervous as well.

At this time, the Great Ancestors of the Xuanqi Pavilion explained, "You don't have to worry, this area is only the natural enemy creature of the Silver Linkun, the Tailed Dragon, but it may not be able to be encountered. Even if it happens, there are two elders from our Xuanqi Pavilion who make a move, and there will definitely be no problems!"

But even after hearing such an explanation, the other Great Ancestors were quite nervous, only Ye Tian was very calm.

Suddenly.

A black-tailed dragon appeared, roaring in the voidless galaxy, and immediately killed the silver linkun.

The strength of this head-tailed dragon is also a top-notch mid-level immeasurable lifeform, but in the voidless galaxy, it will take some time for an ordinary high-level immeasurable lifeform to be able to kill this head-tailed dragon.

And the high-level immeasurable lifeforms didn't dare to fight with all their might here, otherwise they would have to flee for their lives if they attracted an overlord.

I saw Xuanwu Dazu holding a bow and shooting an arrow at the tailed dragon.

The power of this arrow was powerful enough to threaten the tailed dragon.

Rumble!!!!

The body of the tailed dragon was hit, and the scales shattered.

And Xuanwu Dazu did not continue to attack, but let Yinlin Kun escape quickly.

In a short time, Yinlin Kun got rid of the head-tailed dragon.

"It's safe!"

Many Great Ancestors breathed a sigh of relief.
